name: SIPHON of SOULS!
description:
You and your kingdom somehow found out you, yes YOUR half-power got stolen. You were astonished and surprised, how could it be? You kept everything control... You couldn't easily be THAT inattentive to yourself. The Queen ordered you to bring it back. Without the power of yours, you would NEVER fight against the monsters in the battle to protect your kingdom EVER. AGAIN.

You went to the deepest known possible hell core, (you are basically a player at this game but whatever) and you will defeat what is waiting for you to get your power back by any means.

___

This shitty ass gave me inspiration from poppy playtime BUT IT'S HELLA DIFFERENT. Enjoy I guess!!
creator: Viensoflust
